description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a slender build, depicted in a dynamic walking pose. The figure is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeved top and slim pants, with the clothing appearing to be form-fitting and athletic in style. The arms are bent at the elbows, and one leg is extended forward, suggesting movement. The head is upright, and the overall posture is natural and balanced, typical of someone walking at a brisk pace. The shoes are streamlined and likely designed for comfort and mobility. The figure's hair is short and closely cropped, with no visible accessories or carried items.
description: A slender adult pedestrian in athletic, form-fitting attire, captured mid-stride with a natural walking posture and short hair.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from a high angle, highlighting the bent arms and the forward stride, with the head and upper torso clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the extended leg and the dynamic walking pose, with the slim profile of the body and limbs apparent.
description_view_2: A rear three-quarter view shows the back of the legs and the fitted nature of the clothing, as well as the short hairstyle.
description_view_3: The front three-quarter view displays the forward-facing leg, bent arms, and the overall athletic stance, with the head and torso in clear view.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear with a fitted long-sleeve top and slim pants
